expectations.text: Handoff file exists under .claude/handoffs/<repo>/ with YYYY-MM-DD_HHMM_description.md filename
expectations.evidence: Wrote to HANDOFF.md at repo root — no .claude/handoffs/ path, no timestamped filename.
No YAML frontmatter at all — plain markdown. Branch mentioned only in prose ('Branch: `feature/rate-limiter`').

expectations.text: Frontmatter git_commit field matches a real commit hash from fixture history
expectations.evidence: No frontmatter field; hash e1d2867 appears only in prose, not as a structured/parseable field.
Uses its own headings (Where things stand, Uncommitted changes, Next steps) — none of the 7 required headings present.

expectations.text: Content specifically references rate limiter/token bucket work, not generic
expectations.evidence: Content is detailed and specific, comparable in substance to the with-skill run.
No .gitignore created — baseline never used a location that would need gitignoring.

expectations.text: Final message includes exact file path and /resume-handoff command
expectations.evidence: References HANDOFF.md but no /resume-handoff command exists without the skill.
